steps.t: The skull of The Great Aurochs is being held in the lands of the Rauta-lehmä, eastward across Nan Amlug. In order to prove his benign intent to the Ea…
Ragnarr Hornsounder is at the camp of the Suuri-lehmä, west of the Rauta-lehmä camp. You should return the skull of the Great Aurochs to Ragnarr Horns…
